title: A Crew Member on the Line
description: Nami, Usopp, and Robin face Foxy’s tricks in the first Davy Back Fight event while Luffy learns how serious the stakes are.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Tonjit, Usopp. Nami, Usopp, and Robin face Foxy’s tricks in the first Davy Back Fight event while Luffy learns how serious the stakes are.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Were you... waiting for me here!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How I've longed to see you!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm sure she likes him very much.

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: I want to ride it too!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It really is graceful as it runs.

summary: Nami, Usopp, and Robin face Foxy’s tricks in the first Davy Back Fight event while Luffy learns how serious the stakes are.
